quick_skim.title: Making Locality-aware GEMM Compatible with Page-Granularity Placement on Chiplet GPUs
quick_skim.abstract: Multi-chiplet GPUs scale compute throughput and high-bandwidth memory (HBM) capacity, but their non-uniform memory system makes locality between chiplets and their data critical to the GPU's performance and energy efficiency. Locality-aware scheduling and data placement identify which data should reside near each chiplet. However, in general matrix multiplication (GEMM), locality-aware data placement often becomes incompatible with a fixed page-granularity data interleaving, since the optimal granularity for mapping data across chiplets varies widely across workloads. We propose Chiplet-Contiguous Layout, a global memory layout that stores chiplet-local data contiguously. Chiplet-Contiguous Layout enables locality-aware placement compatible with page-granularity placement across diverse large language model (LLM) GEMM shapes, without changes to the operating system or hardware. On representative LLM inference and training GEMMs from Qwen 3 30B and Llama 3.1 70B, Chiplet-Contiguous Layout on average reduces remote HBM traffic by 24.7x on Qwen and 19.2x on Llama over 4KB interleaving, and by 4.1x and 2.1x over coarse locality-aware placement.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: chiplet GPU memory locality for HBM, relates to SI/PI in chiplet packaging
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 小芯片GPU内存局部性与HBM，涉及小芯片封装的SI/PI
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 小芯片GPU内存局部性与HBM，涉及小芯片封装的SI/PI
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 小芯片GPU内存局部性与HBM，涉及小芯片封装的SI/PI
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Chiplet-Contiguous Layout for locality-aware GEMM on chiplet GPUs, addressing page-granularity incompatibility; improves performance for non-uniform memory systems with HBM.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对多小芯片GPU中非均匀内存架构导致的局部性数据放置与固定页粒度交织不兼容问题，提出Chiplet-Contiguous Layout全局内存布局，将小芯片本地数据连续存储，实现与页粒度放置兼容的局部性感知调度。实验表明该方法在多种GEMM工作负载下显著提升性能，为小芯片封装下SI/PI优化提供缓存一致性视角。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对多小芯片GPU中非均匀内存架构导致的局部性数据放置与固定页粒度交织不兼容问题，提出Chiplet-Contiguous Layout全局内存布局，将小芯片本地数据连续存储，实现与页粒度放置兼容的局部性感知调度。实验表明该方法在多种GEMM工作负载下显著提升性能，为小芯片封装下SI/PI优化提供缓存一致性视角。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: SI/PI analysis for 2.5D 3D and Chiplet packaging

quick_skim.title: OpenOpt: An Open-Source SRAM Optimizer Based on Equivalent Circuit Model
quick_skim.abstract: This paper proposes a co-optimization framework that jointly optimizes SRAM architecture and transistor sizing using equivalent circuit models. The framework simplifies inactive SRAM cells into equivalent RC loads and static power models, achieving up to 61.4$\times$ simulation speedup while maintaining high fidelity (read/write delay error $<$0.22%, power error $<$1.68%). A joint search space encompassing architecture parameters and device sizing integrates seven algorithms including SA, PSO, Bayesian Optimization variants, and multi-objective evolutionary algorithms. Based on FreePDK45, ablation experiments confirm complementary gains from architecture selection and transistor sizing. Among all algorithms, MOEA/D achieves the best Figure of Merit (8.2721), yielding 6.2% improvement in SNM, 73.6% reduction in area, and 42.3% reduction in peak power. The framework is publicly available at https://github.com/W1Y1K1/OpenOpt.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: equivalent circuit modeling for SRAM optimization, transferable to PDN
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于等效电路模型的SRAM优化，可用于PDN建模
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于等效电路模型的SRAM优化，可用于PDN建模
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于等效电路模型的SRAM优化，可用于PDN建模
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: OpenOpt uses equivalent circuit models to co-optimize SRAM architecture and transistor sizing, achieving up to 61.4x simulation speedup with high accuracy, demonstrating a method applicable to PDN optimization.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出OpenOpt框架，采用等效电路模型简化SRAM单元，实现架构与尺寸联合优化，在保持高精度的同时获得61.4倍加速。该方法将非活动单元等效为RC负载和静态功耗模型，集成多种优化算法。该技术可直接迁移至电源完整性(PDN)建模中的等效电路简化与优化，具有广泛适用性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文提出OpenOpt框架，采用等效电路模型简化SRAM单元，实现架构与尺寸联合优化，在保持高精度的同时获得61.4倍加速。该方法将非活动单元等效为RC负载和静态功耗模型，集成多种优化算法。该技术可直接迁移至电源完整性(PDN)建模中的等效电路简化与优化，具有广泛适用性。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Power integrity and PDN modeling optimization
